rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MYRNA LEE KIZER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Modify Order Regarding Distribution Of Ronald A Wilson'S Share Of This Estate To His Heirs; Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Upon satisfactory proof having been pesented to the Court, including the Michigan Small Estate Affidavit, the death certificates of Ronald A. Wilson, and of his predeceased wife, Patricia Joan Wilson, and a copy of Ronald A. Wilson's Will, the Motion to Modify this Court's Order of July 9, 2014 is granted in the following respect. The Court finds that the documents presented by the moving party are sufficient evidence upon which to authorize the Administrator to distribute Ronald A. Wilson's share of the esate to Ronald A. Wilson's heirs, Timothy D. Wilson and Julie Wilson Rediger. If no hearing is requested, the Court will issue an Order in conformity with this tentative. If any party objects to this tentative and requests argument, the party must notify the court (415) 551-3702 and all counsel no later than 4:00 pm. on July 16, 2015.
